hero.subline: Yalla.House is a property technology platform — not an estate agency. Get a free dashboard with market data, manage viewings, and sell your way: privately or with agents competing for your instruction.

howItWorksHunter.title: How it works
howItWorksHunter.subtitle: Three steps. Zero spam. Only what you want.
howItWorksHunter.step1Body: Tell us your areas, budget, property type, and must-haves. Takes two minutes — and it's free forever.
howItWorksHunter.step2Body: We scan Rightmove, Zoopla and other portals on your behalf, and match you with Propertymark-accredited local agents who respond with properties that actually fit your criteria.
howItWorksHunter.step3Body: Agent emails, listings, viewing requests — all filtered and organised in your dashboard. No more inbox chaos.

howItWorks.title: How it works
howItWorks.subtitle: Three steps. No commission. Full control.
howItWorks.step1Body: Enter your address and get a free owner dashboard with local market data, comparable sales, and a timeline for your sale.
howItWorks.step2Body: List privately and manage it yourself, or send your Owner Brief to competing agents in one click. They respond with real proposals — you compare and choose.
howItWorks.step3Body: Track every viewing, offer, and update in real time. Whether you're selling privately or through an agent, your dashboard keeps everything in one place.

paths.ownerBody: Get a free dashboard with market data and comparable sales. Sell entirely on your own, or invite agents to compete for your instruction — your property, your rules.
paths.hunterBody: Create your Home Passport and we’ll search Rightmove, Zoopla and other portals on your behalf. We match you with Propertymark-accredited local agents who specialise in exactly what you’re looking for.
paths.agentBody: Receive Owner Briefs from motivated sellers in your area. Respond with your proposal and win the instruction — on merit, not marketing spend. Yalla is a SaaS platform that works for you, not against you.

whyYalla.title: Why Yalla?
whyYalla.item1Title: You get a dashboard. Not a bill.
whyYalla.item1Body: Every other platform charges you to list. We give you a free dashboard first — market data, comparable sales, a timeline for your sale. Sell privately or with an agent. The dashboard is yours either way.
whyYalla.item2Body: Instead of calling one agent and hoping for the best, you send your brief to multiple agents simultaneously. They respond with real proposals. You compare. You choose.
whyYalla.item3Body: Track every viewing, every offer, every piece of feedback in one place. If you instruct an agent, they connect to your dashboard so you see what's happening in real time.
whyYalla.item4Title: We're not agents. We're your tools.
whyYalla.item4Body: Yalla is a technology platform, not an estate agency. We don't take commission. We don't list your property. We give you the information and connections to make the best decision.

whyYallaHunter.title: Why Yalla?
whyYallaHunter.item1Body: Agents blast the same listings to thousands. 90% of what you receive doesn't match what you want. Yalla filters everything through your criteria so only relevant properties reach your dashboard.
whyYallaHunter.item2Title: Agents work for you. Not the other way around.
whyYallaHunter.item2Body: Create your Home Passport once and let agents come to you with properties that fit. No more scrolling. No more chasing. You set the brief — they deliver.
whyYallaHunter.item3Body: Viewings, offers, agent messages, property details — all tracked in your dashboard. No scattered WhatsApp threads, no lost emails, no forgotten viewings.
whyYallaHunter.item4Title: We're a platform, not an agency.
whyYallaHunter.item4Body: Yalla.House connects you with agents in your area. We don't take commission. We don't sell your data. We give you the tools to find your next home — on your terms.

about.heroSubtitle: Yalla.House is a SaaS platform that gives owners, home hunters, and agents the tools to work together more effectively — with full transparency and zero commission.
about.missionTitle: Property works best when everyone has the right information at the right time.
about.missionBody: Owners deserve visibility into how their sale is progressing. Home hunters need relevant matches, not hundreds of irrelevant listings. And good agents deserve a platform that rewards quality service — not marketing spend.
about.rolesTitle: Built for how property actually works.
about.ownerBody: List your property, receive agent proposals, manage viewings, and track everything from one dashboard. You choose how much help you want — sell entirely on your own with our tools, or invite Propertymark-accredited agents to compete for your instruction. Either way, you stay in control.
about.hunterBody: Create your Home Passport — tell us what you’re looking for and we’ll match you with local agents who specialise in exactly that. We also search Rightmove, Zoopla and other property portals on your behalf, so you never miss a listing that fits your brief.
about.agentBody: Get matched with serious buyers and sellers in your area. No cold calling — clients come to you through search briefs. Compete on quality, win on service. Yalla is a SaaS tool that works for your business, not against it.
about.value1Body: Everyone sees what they need to see. Owners track their sale. Hunters get honest matches. Agents get real briefs. No hidden fees, no surprises.
about.value2Body: Real tools: market data, comparable sales, agent match scores, automated updates. We build the infrastructure so people can focus on decisions.
about.value3Body: Agents aren’t the problem — lack of transparency is. Great agents thrive on our platform because quality service speaks for itself.
about.storyP1: When our founder sold a flat in London, the experience was opaque: no live updates, no market data, no visibility into buyer feedback. Not because the agent was bad — but because the tools didn’t exist to share that information easily.
about.storyP2: That’s when the question became clear: what if there was a platform where owners, hunters, and agents could all see what matters — and work together more effectively?
about.storyP3: That’s Yalla.House. A property technology platform, built to fix the way property works for everyone.
about.ctaBody: Whether you’re selling, searching, or an agent looking for better leads — there’s a dashboard for you.

partnerAgreement.title: Yalla Partner Agreement
partnerAgreement.subtitle: One short agreement — then you're connected. Read it, sign it, start importing listings.
partnerAgreement.section1Point1: Property data accessed via Yalla's CRM API is for your internal use only. You may import it into your CRM, share it with colleagues within your agency, and use it to serve the property owner.
partnerAgreement.section1Point2: You must not republish Yalla listing data on third-party portals, scrape it in bulk, or share it outside your agency without the owner's written consent.
partnerAgreement.section1Point3: Owner personal details (name, email, phone) are only revealed once the owner accepts your proposal. Until then, all communication goes through Yalla.
partnerAgreement.section2Point1: When the owner instructs you to list their property on a portal (ImmoScout24, Immowelt, OnTheMarket, etc.), you are pre-authorised to do so under your agency's existing portal agreements.
partnerAgreement.section2Point2: Yalla does not charge for portal listings made through your own agreements. The owner's Yalla dashboard will reflect the live portal status automatically.
partnerAgreement.section2Point3: If the owner revokes your assignment, you must delist the property from any portals within 48 hours.
partnerAgreement.section3Point1: Respond to owner briefs within 48 hours. Briefs that expire without a response may affect your match score.
partnerAgreement.section3Point2: Be transparent about fees. Any commission, fixed fee, or add-on cost must be stated in your proposal before the owner accepts.
partnerAgreement.section3Point3: Yalla reserves the right to suspend API access if these terms are breached. We'll always notify you first and give you a chance to resolve it.
partnerAgreement.versionNotice: Partner Agreement v1.0 — last updated April 2026

ownerInfo.heroTitle: Your property. Full visibility. No commission.
ownerInfo.heroBody: Selling a property shouldn't mean handing everything over and hoping for the best. Yalla.House gives you a dashboard where you see exactly what's happening — every inquiry, every viewing, every offer — and you decide what to do next. List for free, get agent proposals if you want them, and keep every pound of your sale price.
ownerInfo.benefit1Body: Upload photos, set your price, and write your description with AI help. Your listing goes live on free advertising channels — OpenRent, Gumtree, Facebook Marketplace, and more. Want it on Rightmove or Zoopla? Your matched agent handles that. No upfront cost, no commission, no hidden fees.
ownerInfo.benefit2Title: Agents come to you — if you want them
ownerInfo.benefit2Body: 17,000+ verified UK agents can see your listing. Interested ones send you a proposal with their rates and what they'll do. You compare side-by-side and pick the best fit — or handle it all yourself. You're never locked in to using an agent.
ownerInfo.benefit3Body: Your dashboard shows live data: how many people viewed your listing, who requested viewings, which agents responded, and where offers stand. No more calling your agent for an update — it's all there.
ownerInfo.benefit4Body: Set your availability slots. Buyers pick a time that works and it's confirmed instantly — no back-and-forth emails. You see everything in one calendar: upcoming viewings, who's coming, and feedback after.
ownerInfo.benefit5Body: Buyer questions, agent proposals, viewing confirmations, offer notifications — all in one threaded inbox. No more hunting through email, WhatsApp, and voicemail to find that one message about the survey.
ownerInfo.benefit6Title: Keep every pound of your sale price
ownerInfo.benefit6Body: Yalla.House charges no commission on your sale — ever. The average UK agent charges 1.2% + VAT, which on a £350,000 property is over £5,000. That money stays in your pocket. If you choose to use an agent through the platform, you negotiate their fee directly.
ownerInfo.step1Desc: Add photos, property details, and your asking price. Our AI helps you write a compelling description. Takes about 5 minutes.
ownerInfo.step2Desc: Your listing appears on OpenRent, Gumtree, Facebook Marketplace, and more — for free. If you want Rightmove and Zoopla, your matched agent handles that through their portal access.
ownerInfo.step3Desc: Track inquiries, schedule viewings, review agent proposals if you want them, and negotiate offers — all in one place.
ownerInfo.pricingSubtitle: Two plans for two stages: tools for your active sale, then ongoing home management after.
ownerInfo.homePassportSubtitle: your home has a team — even when you're not there
ownerInfo.starterFreeChannels: List on free channels (OpenRent, Gumtree, Facebook)
ownerInfo.homePassportAwayMode: Away mode: home check-ins, pet & plant care
ownerInfo.homePassportDocuments: All property documents in one place
ownerInfo.oneOffServicesBody: Professional photography (from £99), floor plans (from £49), and EPC arrangement (from £60) are available as individual bookings through your dashboard — no subscription required. Need a solicitor? We maintain a directory of verified, SRA-regulated conveyancers you can browse and contact directly — at no cost to you.
ownerInfo.allPlansNote: All plans: zero commission on your sale. The price you agree with your buyer is the price you keep.
ownerInfo.freeAdvertisingTitle: You can advertise your property for free — right now
ownerInfo.freeAdvertisingBody: Only agents can list on Rightmove and Zoopla — they pay thousands per month for that access and pass the cost to you through commission. But there are powerful free channels most sellers don't know about: OpenRent, Gumtree, Facebook Marketplace, and more. Yalla.House helps you list on all of them. If you also want Rightmove/Zoopla exposure, your matched agent handles that as part of their proposal.
ownerInfo.pricingTableTitle: Simple pricing for every user type
ownerInfo.pricingTableSubtitle: Select your role to see what applies to you.
ownerInfo.ownerStarterDesc: Everything you need to get listed and manage your sale yourself.
ownerInfo.ownerProDesc: Professional media and portal presence to maximise your result.
ownerInfo.ownerCompleteDesc: Full service — everything handled, from media to legal close.
ownerInfo.hunterDesc: Browse, save, book viewings, and track offers. No commission, no agent filtering your enquiries.
ownerInfo.hunterF5: Submit & track offers in real time
ownerInfo.hunterPremiumTitle: Coming soon — Premium Home Hunter tools
ownerInfo.hunterPremiumF1: Verified buyer passport (proof of funds, ID)
ownerInfo.hunterPremiumNote: Premium tools will be optional. Free access stays free, always.
ownerInfo.agentDesc: A modern workspace for agents who want to collaborate with owners transparently — without the old commission model.
ownerInfo.agentF4: Owner collaboration mode — they see everything you do
ownerInfo.agentNote: Agent workspace pricing varies by market. We’ll discuss the right model for your region.
ownerInfo.partnerDesc: Earn by referring homeowners, agents, or service providers to Yalla.House. No upfront costs.
ownerInfo.partnerF6: Tiered rewards — more referrals, higher rate
ownerInfo.partnerNote: Partner programme is invite-only during early access. Apply to be considered.
ownerInfo.ctaBody: Create your listing in 5 minutes. No credit card, no commission, no contracts.

legal.cookieMetaDesc: How Yalla.House uses cookies and how you can manage your preferences.
legal.cookieWhatBody1: Cookies are small text files placed on your device (computer, tablet or smartphone) when you visit a website. They help us remember your preferences, keep you signed in and understand how you use our platform.
legal.cookieWhatBody2: Some cookies are essential for the site to work; others help us improve your experience. UK law (the Privacy and Electronic Communications Regulations 2003, or PECR) requires us to tell you about each type and, for non-essential cookies, to obtain your consent.
legal.cookieNecessaryIntro: These cookies are required for the platform to function. They cannot be switched off under PECR because the service you have requested depends on them.
legal.cookieNecessarySessionDesc: Maintain your active session while you browse the platform.
legal.cookieNecessaryAuthDesc: Keep you securely signed in and manage your login state.
legal.cookieNecessaryCsrfDesc: Guard against cross-site request forgery attacks.
legal.cookieNecessaryPrefDesc: Store your cookie consent choices so we respect them on every visit.
legal.cookieAnalyticsIntro: We use anonymised analytics to understand how people use Yalla.House. These cookies are only set after you give consent via our cookie banner.
legal.cookieAnalyticsUsageDesc: Page views, bounce rate and average session duration — all anonymised.
legal.cookieAnalyticsFeatureDesc: Which features are used most, so we can focus our improvements.
legal.cookieAnalyticsErrorDesc: Helps us detect and fix technical problems quickly.
legal.cookieAnalyticsOptional: These cookies are optional. You can decline or withdraw consent at any time.
legal.cookieMarketingBody1: Yalla.House does not currently use any marketing or third-party tracking cookies.
legal.cookieMarketingBody2: We do not share your browsing data with social media platforms or advertising networks.
legal.cookieManageBannerDesc: When you first visit Yalla.House, a consent banner lets you accept or decline optional cookies. You can change your choice at any time by clicking the cookie icon in the footer.
legal.cookieManageBrowserDesc: Most browsers let you view and manage cookies:
legal.cookieManageChrome: Chrome: Settings → Privacy and security → Cookies and other site data
legal.cookieManageFirefox: Firefox: Settings → Privacy & Security → Cookies and Site Data
legal.cookieManageSafari: Safari: Preferences → Privacy → Manage Website Data
legal.cookieManageEdge: Edge: Settings → Cookies and site permissions → Manage and delete cookies
legal.cookieManageWarning: Blocking strictly necessary cookies may prevent parts of the site from working correctly.
legal.cookieDntBody: Some browsers send a Do Not Track (DNT) signal. Yalla.House respects this signal — when we detect it, we will not set optional analytics cookies.
legal.cookieContactBody: If you have any questions about our use of cookies, please contact us:
legal.securityMetaDesc: How Yalla.House protects your data with industry-leading security practices.
legal.securityHeading: Your data security is our priority
legal.securityArchIntro: Yalla.House follows a defence-in-depth approach with multiple layers of protection:
legal.securityArchNetwork: Network security: firewalls, DDoS mitigation, Web Application Firewall (WAF)
legal.securityArchApp: Application security: code reviews, dependency scanning, rate limiting
legal.securityArchData: Data security: encryption at rest and in transit, strict access controls, audit logs
legal.securityArchPhysical: Physical security: hosted in certified, SOC 2-compliant data centres
legal.securityEncTlsBody: All communication between your browser and our servers is encrypted with TLS 1.3 — the latest and most secure HTTPS standard. Certificates are automatically issued and renewed.
legal.securityEncAesBody: Sensitive data at rest is encrypted with AES-256, the gold standard used by governments and financial institutions worldwide.
legal.securityEncPassBody: Yalla.House uses magic-link authentication — no passwords are stored. For any hashed credentials, we use bcrypt with a high work factor.
legal.securityEncTokenBody: Session tokens are short-lived, generated with cryptographically secure random number generators and rotated on every sign-in.
legal.securityAccessRbacBody: Users are assigned roles (Owner, Hunter, Agent, Admin) with specific permissions enforced by Supabase Row Level Security. Each user can only access data appropriate to their role.
legal.securityAccessMfaBody: Admin accounts require multi-factor authentication for an additional layer of security.
legal.securityAccessAuditBody: All sensitive operations — data queries, admin changes, deletions — are logged for traceability and compliance.
legal.securityInfraHostBody: Our database and authentication layer runs on Supabase, hosted in the EU (Frankfurt). Supabase is SOC 2 Type II certified.
legal.securityInfraCdnBody: The web application is served via Vercel’s global edge network with automatic SSL, DDoS protection and ISO 27001-compliant infrastructure.
legal.securityInfraDdosBody: Distributed denial-of-service attacks are mitigated at the edge by Vercel’s built-in protection layer.
legal.securityTestDepsBody: Automated tools scan all dependencies weekly for known vulnerabilities (CVEs). Critical patches are deployed within 24 hours.
legal.securityTestCodeBody: Every code change undergoes peer review with a security focus before deployment.
legal.securityTestScanBody: Automated vulnerability scanning runs in our CI/CD pipeline on every pull request.
legal.securityDisclosureIntro: If you discover a security vulnerability in Yalla.House, we ask you to report it responsibly:
legal.securityDisclosureItem1: A clear description of the vulnerability
legal.securityDisclosureItem3: Potential impact (how could it be exploited?)
legal.securityDisclosureFix: Aim to resolve the issue within 90 days
legal.securityDisclosureUpdate: Keep you informed of our progress
legal.securityBountyBody: We are preparing a formal bug bounty programme to reward responsible security researchers. Details will be published here once the programme launches.
legal.securityBountyContact: In the meantime, please report any findings to security@yalla.house.
legal.privacyDescription: Privacy policy and data protection information for Yalla.House.
legal.dataControllerBody: The data controller responsible for your personal data is:
legal.personalDataBody: When you register or create an account, we collect your name, email address, phone number, and contact information.
legal.listingDataBody: For property listings, we collect descriptions, photos, prices, location data, and other information you provide.
legal.usageDataBody: We collect information about your interactions with the platform, including IP addresses, browser information, and access patterns.
legal.cookiesDataBody: We use cookies and similar technologies for authentication, session management, and analytics. Please refer to our Cookie Policy for more details.
legal.purposeAccountBody: Account creation, magic link authentication, and management of your profile
legal.purposeListingBody: Publishing and syndicating listings on Rightmove and Zoopla
legal.purposeCommsBody: Contacting you, handling support requests, and sending notifications
legal.purposeAnalyticsBody: Anonymous usage statistics to improve our services
legal.purposeLegalBody: Compliance with applicable laws, including the UK Data Protection Act 2018
legal.legalBasisIntro: We process your data under Article 6 of the UK GDPR on the following grounds:
legal.legalBasisConsentBody: Your explicit consent, e.g. for marketing emails
legal.legalBasisContractBody: Necessary to fulfil our contract with you, e.g. account management and listing services
legal.legalBasisLegitimateBody: Security, fraud prevention, and platform improvement
legal.legalBasisObligationBody: Compliance with legal requirements under UK law
legal.dataSharingIntro: Your data is only shared with the following processors:
legal.dataSharingSupabase: EU region (France). Data processing agreement in place.
legal.dataSharingStripe: UK-compliant. See Stripe's privacy policy for further details.
legal.dataSharingPortals: Your listing data is syndicated to publish your property on these portals.
legal.dataSharingVercel: Platform hosted via CDN in EU/UK regions.
legal.dataSharingNoSell: We do not sell your data to marketing companies or any other commercial third parties.
legal.yourRightsIntro: You have the following rights under UK GDPR:
legal.rightAccessBody: You can request to know what data we hold about you at any time
legal.rightRectificationBody: You can request correction of inaccurate or incomplete data
legal.rightErasureBody: You can request deletion of your data, subject to legal retention requirements
legal.rightRestrictionBody: You can request that we restrict processing of your data
legal.rightPortabilityBody: You can receive your data in a structured, machine-readable format
legal.rightObjectionBody: You can object to the processing of your data in certain circumstances
legal.rightExercise: To exercise your rights, contact us at
legal.internationalTransfersBody1: Some of our service providers process data outside the United Kingdom. Where this occurs, we ensure appropriate safeguards are in place, including adequacy decisions and standard contractual clauses.
legal.internationalTransfersBody2: Supabase hosts data in the EU (France), covered by a UK adequacy decision. Vercel uses CDN locations in the EU and UK. Stripe is UK-compliant with its own data protection policies.
legal.dataRetentionBody1: We retain your personal data for as long as necessary to provide our services and fulfil legal obligations. Account data is kept for the duration of your active account.
legal.dataRetentionBody2: After account deletion, your data will be removed within 90 days unless longer retention is required by law (e.g. tax or accounting obligations for up to 6 years).
legal.contactComplaintsIntro: For questions about data protection or to exercise your rights, contact us:
legal.contactComplaintsICO: You also have the right to lodge a complaint with the relevant supervisory authority. For the United Kingdom, this is the Information Commissioner's Office (ICO):
legal.termsDescription: Terms and conditions for using the Yalla.House platform.
legal.termsAboutBody1: These Terms of Service govern your use of the Yalla.House platform, operated by Yalla.House Ltd, a company registered in England and Wales (registration pending).
legal.termsAboutBody2: By accessing or using our platform, you agree to be bound by these terms. Please read them carefully before using our services.
legal.termsAccountBody: To use certain features, you must create an account. When registering, the following rules apply:
legal.termsAccountAge: You must be at least 18 years old to create an account
legal.termsAccountAccurate: You must provide truthful and up-to-date information
legal.termsAccountSecure: You are responsible for keeping your account secure. We use magic link (email OTP) authentication
legal.termsAccountOnePerPerson: Only one account per person is permitted
legal.termsServicesBody: Yalla.House provides a platform for property sellers, buyers, and agents. Our services include:
legal.termsServicesDashboard: Owner dashboard to manage your property sale
legal.termsServicesSyndication: Listing syndication to Rightmove and Zoopla
legal.termsServicesAgentMatch: Agent matching based on location and specialisation
legal.termsServicesHunter: Home Hunter dashboard for personalised property search
legal.termsServicesNoGuarantee: Yalla.House does not guarantee any sale, rental, or specific outcome. We are a platform providing tools and visibility — the final decision rests with the parties involved.
legal.termsPricingBody: Yalla.House operates on a flat-fee model. There are no percentage-based agent commissions.
legal.termsPricingFlatFee: Current pricing starts from £X per listing (exact prices will be published on our pricing page once available). All prices are quoted in British Pounds (GBP).
legal.termsPricingVAT: Where applicable, VAT will be shown separately and charged at the prevailing UK rate.
legal.termsPaymentBody: Payments are processed through our payment provider Stripe. By making a payment, you also agree to Stripe's terms of service.
legal.termsPaymentStripe: We do not store credit card details. All payment information is processed directly by Stripe in accordance with Payment Card Industry standards (PCI DSS).
legal.termsPaymentRefund: Refunds are considered on a case-by-case basis. Once a listing is live on Rightmove or Zoopla, a full refund is not possible as portal fees are non-refundable.
legal.termsObligationsBody: When using Yalla.House, you agree to:
legal.termsObligationsNoFraud: Not engage in any fraudulent or misleading activity
legal.termsObligationsNoFake: Not create fake, misleading, or fictitious listings
legal.termsObligationsNoDiscrimination: Not discriminate and to comply with the Equality Act 2010
legal.termsObligationsComply: Comply with all applicable UK laws and regulations, including the Consumer Protection from Unfair Trading Regulations 2008
legal.termsObligationsAccurate: Provide truthful and up-to-date information in all listings and profiles
legal.termsLiabilityBody1: To the fullest extent permitted by law, the total liability of Yalla.House to you is limited to the amount you have paid to us in the preceding 12 months.
legal.termsLiabilityBody2: We are not liable for indirect, incidental, special, or consequential damages, including loss of profits, data loss, or business interruption.
legal.termsLiabilityBody3: Nothing in these terms limits our liability for death or personal injury caused by negligence, fraud or fraudulent misrepresentation, or any other liability that cannot be excluded by law. Your statutory rights under the Consumer Rights Act 2015 are not affected.
legal.termsTerminationBody1: You may delete your account at any time by contacting us at support@yalla.house.
legal.termsTerminationBody2: We reserve the right to suspend or terminate accounts that breach these terms, with immediate effect and without prior notice in cases of serious breach.
legal.termsTerminationBody3: Upon termination, your access to the platform will end. Any published listings will be removed from the portals. Fees already paid are non-refundable.
legal.termsGoverningLawBody1: These terms are governed by and construed in accordance with the laws of England and Wales.
legal.termsGoverningLawBody2: Disputes arising from these terms are subject to the non-exclusive jurisdiction of the courts of England. As a consumer, you may be entitled to additional rights under the laws of your country of residence.
legal.termsChangesBody1: We may update these terms at any time. For material changes, we will notify you by email or via a platform notification at least 30 days in advance.
legal.termsChangesBody2: By continuing to use the platform after changes take effect, you agree to the updated terms. If you do not agree with the changes, you may close your account.
legal.termsContactBody: If you have questions about these Terms of Service, contact us:

faq.heroSubtitle: Everything you need to know about selling, searching, and partnering on Yalla.House.
faq.ownerA1: Yalla.House is a property technology platform — not an estate agency. We give you the tools to list your property, manage viewings, receive agent proposals, and track everything from one dashboard. You choose how much help you want, from selling entirely on your own to working with a Propertymark-accredited local agent.
faq.ownerQ2: How does my property get on Rightmove and Zoopla?
faq.ownerA2: Once you complete your listing on Yalla.House, we distribute it to the UK's major property portals including Rightmove and Zoopla. Your listing appears alongside those from traditional estate agents — buyers won't see any difference.
faq.ownerQ3: Do I need an estate agent to sell?
faq.ownerA3: No. You can manage the entire sale yourself through your owner dashboard — from listing creation to viewing management. If you'd prefer some professional support, local agents on the platform can submit proposals for your property. You're always in control of who you work with and how much help you accept.
faq.ownerQ4: What if I get stuck or need help during the process?
faq.ownerA4: Your dashboard includes step-by-step guidance at every stage. If you want expert input, you can invite a local agent to help with specific tasks like valuations, viewings, or negotiations — without handing over the whole process.
faq.ownerQ5: Can I list a rental property too?
faq.ownerA5: Yes. Yalla.House supports both sales and lettings. Choose the appropriate listing type when you create your property, and it will be distributed to the relevant portals.
faq.hunterA1: Your Home Passport is a profile that tells us exactly what you're looking for — area, budget, property type, timeline, and your personal priorities. We use it to match you with local Propertymark-accredited agents who specialise in exactly what you need, and to search property portals on your behalf.
faq.hunterQ2: Does Yalla.House search for properties on my behalf?
faq.hunterA2: Yes. Once your Home Passport is complete, Yalla.House searches Rightmove, Zoopla, and other major UK property portals to find listings that match your criteria. You'll see matches in your dashboard without having to check multiple sites yourself.
faq.hunterA3: Based on your Home Passport — your target areas, budget, and preferences — we match you with local agents who have active listings and expertise in those areas. All agents on the platform are Propertymark-accredited, which means they're regulated by the UK's professional trade body for estate agents.
faq.hunterA4: Yes, completely free. Creating your Home Passport, getting matched with agents, and accessing your dashboard costs nothing. There are no hidden fees for home hunters.
faq.hunterQ5: Can I search for rentals as well as properties to buy?
faq.hunterA5: Absolutely. When you create your Home Passport, you specify whether you're looking to buy, rent, or both. Your matches and portal searches are tailored accordingly.
faq.agentA1: Yalla.House gives you a free SaaS dashboard to manage your pipeline, respond to owner and hunter enquiries, and grow your business. Think of it as a lightweight CRM purpose-built for property professionals — not another portal that competes with you for clients.
faq.agentA2: Property owners can invite proposals from local agents, and home hunters are matched to you based on your coverage areas and expertise. Leads arrive directly in your Yalla.House dashboard, where you can respond, track progress, and manage your pipeline.
faq.agentQ3: Is there a cost for agents?
faq.agentA3: The dashboard is free to use. You manage your own fee arrangements directly with clients — Yalla.House doesn't take a cut of your commission.
faq.agentA4: Propertymark is the UK's leading professional body for estate agents. Accredited agents meet strict standards including client money protection, professional indemnity insurance, and ongoing regulatory compliance. All agents on Yalla.House are sourced from Propertymark's accredited membership.
faq.pricingQ1: Is it really free to list my property?
faq.pricingA1: You can create your listing and manage it from your dashboard at no cost. Portal distribution to Rightmove, Zoopla, and other major sites is included in our listing packages, which start from a flat fee with no commission and no percentage of your sale price.
faq.pricingQ2: Are there any hidden fees or commission?
faq.pricingA2: No commission, ever. Yalla.House charges a transparent flat fee for portal distribution. There are no success fees, no percentage cuts, and no surprise charges. You keep every pound from your sale.
faq.pricingQ3: What payment methods do you accept?
faq.pricingA3: We accept all major credit and debit cards. Payment is processed securely through Stripe, and you'll receive a receipt by email.
faq.trustQ1: How do I know the agents are legitimate?
faq.trustA1: Every agent on Yalla.House is Propertymark-accredited. Propertymark is the UK's regulated professional body for estate agents, requiring members to carry client money protection, professional indemnity insurance, and comply with anti-money-laundering regulations.
faq.trustA2: Yes. We use industry-standard encryption, store data on secure EU-based servers, and never sell your personal information to third parties. You can read our full Privacy Policy for details on how we handle your data.
faq.trustQ3: What happens if something goes wrong with my sale?
faq.trustA3: Your dashboard keeps a full record of all communications and activity. If you're working with an agent through the platform, Propertymark's complaints process provides an additional layer of protection. You can also contact our support team at any time.
faq.ctaBody: Our team is here to help. Drop us a line and we'll get back to you.

providerOnboarding.benefit3Body: Manage enquiries, track quotes, and grow your pipeline from one place.

hunterInfo.heroBody: Most platforms make you trawl through hundreds of listings, then cold-call agents who don't pick up. Yalla.House works differently: you create your Home Passport once — what you're looking for, your budget, your timeline — and local agents who specialise in exactly that come to you with relevant properties. No scrolling, no chasing. You pick who to work with.
hunterInfo.passportTitle: Your Home Passport is the centre of everything
hunterInfo.passportBody: Your passport is a structured profile of what you need: areas, budget, property type, bedrooms, timeline, languages, and any specific requirements. Fill it out once, and it powers everything — agent matching, property alerts, search filters, and your readiness badges.
hunterInfo.benefit1Body: When you save your passport, agents in your target area see your brief and reply with relevant properties. You review all replies and pick who to work with — like getting proposals instead of making cold calls.
hunterInfo.benefit2Body: Browse properties from free advertising channels and our partner agents in one place. Filter by location, price, type, and features. Save searches and get notified when new matches appear. See comparable prices in the area to know if a property is fairly priced.
hunterInfo.benefit3Body: Our agent directory covers 100+ UK postcode areas, sourced from professional registries including Propertymark, NAEA, and ARLA. Each agent has a profile with their coverage areas and specialisms. We're expanding to Germany, France, and the Netherlands next.
hunterInfo.benefit4Body: Messages from agents, property alerts, viewing confirmations, and document requests — all in one threaded inbox. No more juggling email, WhatsApp, and phone calls across five different agents.
hunterInfo.benefit5Body: Beyond bedrooms and budget: search by accessibility needs (wheelchair accessible, step-free), soundproofing, EV charging, pet-friendly, garden size — requirements that matter to you but most platforms ignore. Coming soon: team up with others on a shared home search.
hunterInfo.benefit6Body: Creating your passport, getting matched with agents, browsing listings, and messaging are all free. You only pay if you want premium features like instant alerts or priority matching.
hunterInfo.readinessTitle: Readiness badges — stand out to agents
hunterInfo.readinessSubtitle: Agents prioritise serious hunters. Earn badges on your profile to show you're ready to move — and get faster, better responses.
hunterInfo.readinessNote: Badges are optional. Need a mortgage in principle? We can connect you with a broker — at no cost to you.
hunterInfo.pricingSubtitle: Search for free. Pay for speed.
hunterInfo.proTierFeature2: Instant alerts when new listings match
hunterInfo.comingSoonBody: Shared home search — team up with friends or housemates to hunt together (beta). Living community matching for co-living and house shares.
hunterInfo.ctaBody: Tell us what you're looking for. Takes 2 minutes. Agents start matching within hours.

agentInfo.heroBody: You became an agent to help people find homes — not to spend half your day chasing callbacks, re-typing buyer details, and coordinating diaries over email. Yalla.House handles the boring work so you can focus on what you're actually good at: closing deals and building relationships.
agentInfo.benefit1Title: Online calendar — no more back and forth
agentInfo.benefit1Body: Set your availability once. Home hunters and owners pick a slot that works for them — confirmed instantly. No more 6-email chains to book a single viewing. You see everything in one calendar: viewings, follow-ups, offer deadlines.
agentInfo.benefit2Body: Messages, emails, viewing reminders, document requests, offer notifications — all in one place. No more switching between your phone, email, WhatsApp, and your CRM to piece together what's happening with a deal. One thread per client, full history, searchable.
agentInfo.benefit3Title: Verified home hunters — ready to go
agentInfo.benefit3Body: Every hunter who reaches you has already filled out their Home Passport: budget, area, property type, timeline, finance status, languages. No more 20-minute onboarding calls to find out what they're looking for. It's all there before you even reply.
agentInfo.benefit4Title: Optional CRM sync — everyone stays in the loop
agentInfo.benefit4Body: Connect your existing CRM and Yalla.House keeps it updated automatically. New leads, viewing outcomes, offer status — synced in real time. Owners and hunters see live progress without you having to send manual updates. Saves hours every week.
agentInfo.benefit5Body: The platform automates the work that eats your time: scheduling, status updates, document collection, follow-up reminders. Agents on similar platforms report saving 8–12 hours per week on admin alone. That's two extra viewings a day, or a Friday off.
agentInfo.benefit6Body: Your agency name, logo, and profile are front and centre. When a hunter sees your proposal, they see you — not a generic platform. Build your reputation on Yalla.House with verified reviews, response times, and a track record that speaks for itself.
agentInfo.step1Desc: They fill out their Home Passport: location, budget, bedrooms, property type, timeline. This becomes a structured brief.
agentInfo.step2Desc: If the hunter's target area overlaps with your coverage areas, their brief lands in your Briefs tab. You see the full picture before deciding to respond.
agentInfo.step3Title: You reply with properties and your pitch
agentInfo.step3Desc: Send relevant listings and your service offer. The hunter compares all proposals and picks who to work with. No cold calls — they chose you.
agentInfo.pricingSubtitle: Start free. Upgrade when you need more.
agentInfo.freeAdTitle: Free advertising — the gatekeepers won't tell you this
agentInfo.freeAdBody: Rightmove and Zoopla charge agents thousands per month. Yalla.House lists your matched properties on free advertising channels too — OpenRent, Gumtree, Facebook Marketplace, and more. Your listings get exposure without the portal fees. The big portals don't want you to know this works, but it does.
agentInfo.ctaTitle: Start free — upgrade when it makes sense
agentInfo.ctaBody: Set up your profile in 2 minutes. Start receiving matched briefs from home hunters in your area today. No credit card, no contracts.

partners.metaDescription: Join the Yalla.House partner network. Estate agents, photographers, conveyancers, and service providers — grow your business with qualified leads.
partners.heroSubtitle: Join a network of 17,000+ verified agents and service providers. Get matched with serious clients in your area — no cold calling required.
partners.estateAgentsDesc: Receive search briefs from matched home hunters. Compete on quality and service, not on who shouts the loudest. Get live CRM updates when clients are connected.
partners.estateAgentsBullet1: Qualified leads matched to your area
partners.estateAgentsBullet3: Free to join — pay nothing until you close
partners.photographersDesc: Owners need professional photos and virtual tours. Get booked directly through the platform for property shoots in your area.
partners.photographersBullet2: Set your own rates and availability
partners.solicitorsDesc: Sellers and buyers need legal support. Get connected to clients at the right stage of their property journey — when they actually need you.
partners.solicitorsBullet1: Warm referrals at point of sale
partners.solicitorsBullet2: Profile visibility to all platform users
partners.referralPartnersDesc: Know someone selling or buying? Refer them to Yalla.House and earn a referral fee when they list or transact through the platform.
partners.step1Desc: Set your coverage areas, specialisms, and service tiers. We verify your details against professional registries.
partners.step2Desc: When a home hunter saves a search in your area, you'll see their brief — budget, property type, timeline, preferences. No guessing.
partners.step3Desc: Send a proposal with relevant properties or your service pitch. The hunter reviews all proposals and picks the best fit. You compete on quality.
partners.statCost: To join — free forever for agents
partners.ctaBody: Join Yalla.House and start receiving qualified leads in your area. Free to join, no contracts, no lock-ins.

meta.siteDescription: Sell your property without an agent. Free. Commission-free. List on major property portals.
